name: property managers managing 5–15 properties tool
description: For property managers managing 5–15 properties, inconsistent scheduling causes compliance issues. We automate scheduling instead of manual scheduling via email or phone calls.
problem_solved: Inconsistent scheduling of equipment inspections leading to potential compliance issues.
